[THE CORE TASK IS TO COMPUTE THE DIFFERENCE IN SECONDS PER QUESTION BETWEEN CHEMISTRY AND BIOLOGY TESTS]  
[THE BIOLOGY TEST HAS 25 QUESTIONS AND 45 MINUTES]  
[THE CHEMISTRY TEST HAS 20 QUESTIONS AND 60 MINUTES]  
[THE TIME PER QUESTION FOR BIOLOGY IS CALCULATED AS 45 MINUTES DIVIDED BY 25 QUESTIONS]  
[THE TIME PER QUESTION FOR CHEMISTRY IS CALCULATED AS 60 MINUTES DIVIDED BY 20 QUESTIONS]  
[THE DIFFERENCE IN TIME PER QUESTION IS FOUND BY SUBTRACTING THE TWO VALUES]  
[THE RESULT IS THE NUMBER OF SECONDS MORE SHE CAN SPEND ON EACH QUESTION IN CHEMISTRY]  
[THE PEN IS MIGHTIER THAN SWORD]
